name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ba

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-ba
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Ba SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Ba SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-ba
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common ba
```

param _CheckSamePerson: "\u662F\u5426\u5148\u5224\u65AD\u540C\u6B65\u7684\u7F51\u7AD9\

  \ sitePersonCerType,sitePersonCerNum\u4E09\u4E2A\u5B57\u6BB5\u5B8C\u5168\u4E00\u81F4\
  ) \u9ED8\u8BA4:true. \u975E\u5FC5\u8981 \u4E0D\u5EFA\u8BAE\u5173\u95ED\u4FEE\u6539\
  \u8BE5\u53C2\u6570\u9ED8\u8BA4\u503C"
param _IcpOrderId: "\u5907\u6848ICP\u8BA2\u5355\u53F7"

  \u4F1A\u81EA\u52A8\u8DF3\u8FC7)"
type CheckSamePerson: bool
type IcpOrderId: str
type SourceWebId: str
type SyncFields: list of str
type TargetWebIds: list of str
---

documentation:
是否先判断同步的网站负责人是否一致 (这里会判断 sitePersonName, sitePersonCerType,sitePersonCerNum三个字段完全一致) 默认:true. 非必要 不建议关闭修改该参数默认值
\:rtype: bool
